name: empty_seq_vacuously_true
reason: empty sequence vacuously satisfies any predicate — tests that the biconditional handles the empty case correctly

name: index_form_implies_contains_form
reason: tests the index-to-contains direction of the biconditional

name: contains_form_implies_index_form
reason: tests the contains-to-index direction of the biconditional

name: singleton_pred_true
reason: singleton with pred true should satisfy the contains form — tests minimal nontrivial case

name: negated_pred_false_element_not_in_seq
reason: element failing pred should not be contained — tests contrapositive of the contains-form universal
